reason: This lead is not currently in redesign mode.

previewability.reason: The lead is reachable and has enough context for a starter preview.

productionReadiness.reason: Evidence still needs cleanup before production handoff.
errors: At least one CTA is required: cta.call, cta.reserve, or cta.map
Restaurant menu source is required before rendering a menu page

redesignValue: Give the business a clearer first impression and a cleaner path to action.

outreachAngle.hook: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your restaurant in Fortitude Valley, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
outreachAngle.observation: Google Maps showed Facebook only / no independent website visible during Discord discovery.
outreachAngle.diagnosis: The Vietnamese Restaurant appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible restaurant site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
